scripts.build: bun run build-templates && bun run build-blocks
scripts.build-templates: mkdir -p dist/templates && mjml src/templates/*.mjml -o dist/templates/ --config.allowIncludes true
scripts.build-watch: bun run build-templates-watch & bun run build-blocks-watch
scripts.build-templates-watch: mkdir -p dist/templates && mjml -w src/templates/*.mjml -o dist/templates/ --config.allowIncludes true
scripts.build-minify: bun run build-templates-minify && bun run build-blocks-minify
scripts.build-templates-minify: mkdir -p dist/templates && mjml src/templates/*.mjml -o dist/templates/ --config.allowIncludes true --config.minify true
scripts.build-blocks-minify: mkdir -p dist/blocks && mjml src/blocks/*.mjml -o dist/blocks/ --config.minify true
